ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* Reference to the company that initiated the mission */,
  "freelance_id" TEXT /* Reference to the freelance worker assigned to the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., local, international) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the mission (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated number of hours required to complete the mission */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual number of hours spent on the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_freelance_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelance_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freelancers" (
  "freelance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each freelancer */,
  "freelancer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the freelancer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of specialty for the freelancer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the freelancer */,
  "freelancer_rate" TEXT /* Hourly rate of the freelancer */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the freelancer */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills possessed by the freelancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freelance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "mission_id" TEXT /* ID of the mission being updated */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the mission progress */,
  "percentage_complete" INTEGER /* Percentage of the mission that is complete */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Actual time spent on the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_progress_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions_projects" (
  "mission_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission-project association */,
  "mission_id" TEXT /* ID of the mission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or campaign the mission is part of */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_projects_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "mission_id" TEXT /* ID of the mission associated with the message */,
  "sender_id" TEXT /* ID of the sender (company or freelancer) */,
  "receiver_id" TEXT /* ID of the receiver (company or freelancer) */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "mission_id" TEXT /* ID of the mission associated with the file */,
  "uploader_id" TEXT /* ID of the uploader (company or freelancer) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "mission_id" TEXT /* ID of the mission associated with the payment */,
  "freelance_id" TEXT /* ID of the freelancer who received the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_freelance_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelance_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelance_id")
)
